top_signals.title: China's Moonshot AI halts subscriptions for Kimi K3 after users surge
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SEC sues Mining Automatic and founder over alleged $22M crypto mining scheme
top_signals.summary: The SEC alleges Mining Automatic and its founder raised $22 million from investors by promising guaranteed crypto mining returns while spending only a fraction of the funds on mining operations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: S&P Slips as Apple, Tesla Keep Broader Chipmaker Gains in Check
top_signals.summary: The S&P 500 Index erased early gains to finish lower as a decline in Apple Inc. and Tesla Inc. offset advances elsewhere. Chipmakers rebounded ahead of a deluge of earnings reports that will test whether Big Tech’s profits can match high expectations.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Honda holds on to hope for China business with GAC tie-up extension
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump’s crypto ethics stance leaves Clarity Act negotiations in limbo
top_signals.summary: A meeting last week to discuss an ethics provision to address President Trump's vast crypto wealth has become something of a black box.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Remarks by Commissioner Albuquerque at the press conference on the Report on the competitiveness of the EU banking sector
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 17 Jul 2026 Good afternoon, ladies and gentlemen, and thank you for your presence.
Today, the Commission is presenting its report on the competitiveness of the banking sect...
